summary: Tested 5 Excel export endpoints (backend), Finance UAT (FinanceReportsHub, APAging, ValidationQueue), and Mobile UX. All backend APIs return 200. All UI features functional on correct routes. Key finding: review request uses wrong URL paths (/procurement/prs, /procurement/pos, /finance/anomaly, /finance/validation-queue) - actual routes are /procurement/pr, /procurement/po, /finance/anomalies, /finance/validation.
action_items: INFORMATIONAL: URL paths in review request don't match actual frontend routes. The components work correctly on actual routes. Main agent should note: /procurement/prs→/procurement/pr, /procurement/pos→/procurement/po, /finance/anomaly→/finance/anomalies, /finance/validation-queue→/finance/validation. Consider adding redirect routes if the old URLs are referenced externally.
critical_code_review_comments: Routes referenced in test request (/procurement/prs, /procurement/pos, /finance/anomaly, /finance/validation-queue) don't exist in router - pages render completely blank with no 404 fallback. Consider adding redirect routes or a proper 404 page.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on correct routes, 0% on URLs specified in review request

context_for_next_testing_agent: All export features work. Correct URLs: PRList=/procurement/pr, POList=/procurement/po, AnomalyFeed=/finance/anomalies, ValidationQueue=/finance/validation, APAging=/finance/ap-aging, PayrollList=/hr/payroll, FinanceReportsHub=/finance/reports. Token stored as erp_token in localStorage. Payroll mobile (375px): Export Excel visible, no horizontal overflow. APAging: buckets, table, xlsx+csv export buttons all present.
rca_of_issue: Review request specifies incorrect URL paths (/procurement/prs instead of /procurement/pr, /procurement/pos instead of /procurement/po, /finance/anomaly instead of /finance/anomalies, /finance/validation-queue instead of /finance/validation). The React Router routes in ProcurementPortal.jsx and FinancePortal.jsx use singular paths. When navigated to wrong paths, the app renders the portal layout but no matching route component, resulting in blank content area.
